---
title: "amplitude_apply"
generated: true
description: "Decorator for applying a function to the amplitude component of a complex tensor."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.numerics.tensor_ops`](../nitrix-numerics-tensor_ops.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix._internal.util`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:amplitude_apply -->
```python
amplitude_apply(func: Callable[[Float[Array, ...]], Float[Array, ...]]) -> Callable[[Complex[Array, ...]], Complex[Array, ...]]
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:amplitude_apply -->
Decorator for applying a function to the amplitude component of a complex
tensor.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:amplitude_apply -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `func` | `Callable[[Float[Array, ...]], Float[Array, ...]]` | — | — | — |

**Returns** `Callable[[Complex[Array, ...]], Complex[Array, ...]]`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
